title: Kill Me Tender
overview: Do all men want the same thing? Nestor, recently widowed, runs a bakery near Barcelona, has a bank account and a bad heart, and swims in the sea every day. He also has a daughter and a two-timing son-in-law. Nestor's maid asks him to hire her 20-something daughter, Maribel, as a shop assistant.

trailers.title: Haz conmigo lo que quieras (2003) - Ingrid Rubio, Alberto Sanjuán, Carles Flavià
